title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Material correctness risk:** workflow-side acceptance recheck does not validate against structured `acceptance` entries; it only checks normalized substring presence in full ticket text, so a forged payload can pass if the text appears elsewhere in the ticket body. References: [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L184), [kernel-task-completion-backup.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/kernel-task-completion-backup.yml#L185), stricter producer behavior in [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L282), [task_backup.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L294). - **Material regression risk:** workflow recheck is not behavior-tested end-to-end; current repo test only asserts workflow text contains guard strings (`grep`) and does not execute mismatch/failure paths of the recheck step. References: [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L249), [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L271). - **No material finding in prompt alignment:** Kernel prompt contract and adapter contract are currently aligned on bound completion fields including normalized `project_os.acceptance_text`. References: [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L39), [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L64).
